name: qualia-v4-pointers-empty-state
description: Newly-selected node with no pointers — Properties panel should show the empty-state copy and an '+ Add pointer' button. Tests the Wave A → B authoring surface from the qualia-v4 plan.

checkpoints.name: pointers-empty-state
checkpoints.description: In the right-hand Properties panel of Qualia, verify: (1) node info section showing Label / Type / Subtitle / Importance, (2) a small light-gray section heading further down the panel — look for the WORD 'Pointers' in any case (it may be uppercase, lowercase, or styled as a small section label), (3) a sentence under it saying there are no pointers yet, (4) a button (often dashed-outline) containing the text 'Add pointer'. Pass if all four are visible. Reasoning ≤ 20 words; list missing items or write 'all present'.
